title: pulegium parviflorum
intro: Pulegium parviflorum, also known as pennyroyal, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its carminative and antispasmodic properties, which help to relieve digestive issues such as bloating, gas, and nausea. The health benefits of pennyroyal include its ability to act as a natural insect repellent, reduce menstrual cramps, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. Pennyroyal can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, essential oils, and topical creams, although its use is often cautioned due to potential risks associated with high doses or prolonged consumption.
